texto: It used to be that a novel would put you among people, tell you a story or stories, give you some sense of what it might be like to see a different cut-out and perspective of the world: as a schoolteacher, an adulteress, the wife of a member of Parliament, an officer, a cockroach.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Michael Hofmann: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a educacao. O trecho “It used to be that a novel would put you among people, tell you a story or stories, give you some…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, novel, story pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e story.
